title: Implement WorkOffer indexes and bounded reason traces
summary: Implement state-change-driven WorkOffer registration, indexed candidate lookup, bounded Top-K scoring input and structured reason traces.
acceptance: Work producers register and update offers on state changes rather than pawn world scans
Indexes are keyed by work type, region, def, urgency and permission with documented candidate caps
ReasonTrace records candidate counts, filter stages, rejection reasons and selected offer with bounded storage
Benchmark proves 100 pawn thinking over 10k offers avoids Pawn x WorkType x AllEntities complexity

history.details: Implemented derived WorkOffer composite indexes, bounded top-offer selection, ReasonTrace ring storage, work-offers tests, benchmark, docs and report.

verified: Verified WM-0024: WorkOfferIndex is derived state with state-change registration/update/removal, exact composite lookup is bounded by candidateCap, ReasonTraceStore is fixed-capacity structured storage, sim-core boundary/determinism checks are clean, and required work-offers tests/benchmark pass.
Fast-forward integrated verified WM-0024 into main after handoff, coordination, whitespace and quality gates passed.

review.summary: Verified WM-0024: WorkOfferIndex is derived state with state-change registration/update/removal, exact composite lookup is bounded by candidateCap, ReasonTraceStore is fixed-capacity structured storage, sim-core boundary/determinism checks are clean, and required work-offers tests/benchmark pass.

integration.summary: Fast-forward integrated verified WM-0024 into main after handoff, coordination, whitespace and quality gates passed.
